title: O’Neill School researchers to shape future policy at MPSA Conference
summary_en: O’Neill School scholars will present research and lead sessions at the 83rd MPSA Conference, showcasing policy insights and emerging leaders in political science.
title_cn: 奥尼尔学院研究人员将在中西部政治科学协会大会上参与未来政策制定

title: Simon appointed an editor of the Review of Economics and Statistics
summary_en: O’Neill School professor Kosali Simon is appointed editor of the Review of Economics and Statistics, helping guide top economic research and scholarly discourse.
title_cn: 西蒙获任《经济学与统计学评论》编辑
